chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3720 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.18 2. For order on CMA No.19635/2022 3. For order on CMA No.19636/2022 4. For order on CMA No.16370/2022 5. For hearing of main case 22.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This case is of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 05.8.2022, which is also over three years ago. In the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any serious efforts to pursue this petition. Today, despite lapse of three years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
